category_sources: source_facts.description says Task is a task runner/build tool; official taskfile.dev homepage describes Task as a fast, cross-platform build tool inspired by Make.
display_name_sources: Official taskfile.dev homepage headline uses Task; source_facts.homepage is https://taskfile.dev/.
docs_sources: Official taskfile.dev navigation links to Docs/Guide, and the homepage provides Get Started and Guide entry points.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/go-task/task; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official taskfile.dev homepage describe task running, build automation, cross-platform workflows, code generation, formatters, and linters.
